entries.translation: Он попросил у меня разрешения воспользоваться телефоном.

entries.word: Tom put his phone back in his pocket.
entries.translation: Том сунул телефон обратно в карман.

entries.word: It's not a computer problem.
Phone me if you find Tom.
If you want, you can phone me.
Tom has bought a new computer.
Tom couldn't get Mary to tell him her phone number.
entries.translation: Том так и не смог добиться от Мэри её номера телефона.

entries.word: I'm calling from a cell phone.
Tom has already gotten three threatening phone messages.
entries.translation: Том уже получил три телефонных звонка с угрозами.

entries.word: Tom constantly checks his phone.
I want a new computer for my birthday.
entries.translation: Я хочу на день рождения новый компьютер.

entries.word: I'm on the phone.
What's your favorite iPhone app?
entries.translation: Какое твое любимое приложение для айфона?

entries.word: Tom is at the computer.
I need a charger for my phone.
Tom sits at his computer eight hours a day.
entries.translation: Том сидит за компьютером по восемь часов в день.

entries.word: What games do you have on your phone?
entries.translation: Какие у тебя игры на телефоне?

entries.word: Does anyone have a mobile phone charger?
entries.translation: У кого-нибудь есть зарядка для телефона?

entries.word: "May I use this telephone?" "Go ahead."
I've already memorized your phone number.
entries.translation: Я уже запомнил ваш номер телефона.

entries.word: The app won't open.
Update the app.
Don't touch the computer.
Tom seldom uses his phone.
Tom's phone number is easy to remember.
Someone's on the phone for you.
Tom spends a lot of time in front of his computer.
entries.translation: Том проводит много времени за компьютером.

entries.word: I saw a mouse!
The computer stopped working.
Did you charge the battery of your mobile phone?
Tom has a gramophone.
The Internet is now something we can't live without.
entries.translation: В наше время интернет — то, без чего мы не можем жить.

entries.word: Do you know how to use a computer?
What would life be like without the internet?
entries.translation: Какой была бы жизнь без интернета?

entries.word: He caught a mouse.
Has anybody seen my phone?
The call is free of charge.
We have had difficulty reaching you by phone.
entries.translation: Нам было сложно до вас дозвониться.

entries.word: Take a picture with your phone.
Tom's computer is much newer than mine.
When will you phone Tom?
I've got Tom's phone number.
Tom spends all his time on the computer.
entries.translation: Том всё своё время проводит за компьютером.

entries.word: I need that phone.
He's talking on the telephone.
Tom was always in charge.
Tom often talks on the phone.
Tom has an easy-to-remember phone number.
Tom handed the phone to Mary.
What did you do to my phone?
entries.translation: Что ты сделал с моим телефоном?

entries.word: What's this computer doing here?
That's his private website.
Where's my computer?
I forgot to put my phone on the charger last night.
entries.translation: Я вчера вечером забыл поставить телефон на зарядку.

entries.word: I like this website.
Tom, your phone is ringing.
Do you like computer games?
That's not my computer.
Do you update your website often?
Mary wrote down her phone number and gave it to Tom.
entries.translation: Мэри записала свой номер телефона и дала его Тому.

entries.word: I bought a computer.
Tom has a pet mouse.
The parking lot is free of charge.
As I was having lunch, the phone rang.
Who was that who answered your phone?
entries.translation: Кто это к твоему телефону подошёл?

entries.word: I suspect that Tom knows Mary's phone number.
entries.translation: Подозреваю, что Том знает номер телефона Мэри.

entries.word: I can probably reach Tom by phone right now.
entries.translation: Я, вероятно, могу дозвониться до Тома сейчас.

entries.word: Tom put the phone to his ear.
I forgot his phone number.
Do you have an Android phone?
Where's my cell phone?
Tom made a few phone calls.
Tom just got off the phone with Mary.
entries.translation: Том только что закончил говорить по телефону с Мэри.

entries.word: Was that my phone ringing?
Enter the information into the computer.
"What's wrong?" "My computer just crashed."
entries.translation: "Что не так?" — "Мой компьютер только что аварийно завершил работу".

entries.word: I wonder whether Tom knows Mary's phone number.
entries.translation: Интересно, знает ли Том телефон Мэри.

entries.word: I'll phone tomorrow morning.
You can find more information on our website.
entries.translation: Больше информации вы можете найти на нашем сайте.

entries.word: My laptop broke.
I don't answer the phone when I'm working.
entries.translation: Я не подхожу к телефону, когда работаю.

entries.word: Tom called Mary, but someone else answered her phone.
entries.translation: Том позвонил Мэри, но трубку взял кто-то другой.

entries.word: Tom shut off his computer.
Tom shouldn't have told Mary his password.
entries.translation: Тому не стоило говорить Мэри свой пароль.

entries.word: This is a megaphone.
Tom doesn't have a phone.
My keyboard is broken.
I suspect Tom knows Mary's phone number.
entries.translation: Подозреваю, что Том знает номер телефона Мэри.

entries.word: I woke up when the phone rang.
Tom left his computer on.
We're looking for somebody who can use a computer.
entries.translation: Мы ищем кого-нибудь, кто умеет пользоваться компьютером.

entries.word: Tom dropped his phone.
I was in the bath when the phone rang.
entries.translation: Я была в ванной, когда зазвонил телефон.

entries.word: The phone rang.
I gave Tom Mary's phone number.
entries.translation: Я дал Тому номер телефона Мэри.
